title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, essential oils helps with baldness because of its potential to stimulate hair growth and improve scalp health. The oil's antifungal and antibacterial properties create a favorable environment for hair follicles to thrive. Additionally, thyme essential oil's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to hair loss.
